channel.title: Michael Mitchell on Bluesky
channel.description: Born Again Christian who loves technology. Wondering when I will get every electronic device I want.

item.title: I am at the eye doctors for my pre cataract removal appointm...
item.description: I am at the eye doctors for my pre cataract removal appointment the only thing for sure i am getting a toric lens. Can't wait to see clearly again.

item.title: On Star Wars Day, we remember that sometimes the biggest jou...
item.description: On Star Wars Day, we remember that sometimes the biggest journeys start with the smallest steps—and a little ⚔️ faith. 🚀 #Maythe4th #StarWars

item.title: I came across this hilarious YouTube short from a British TV...
item.description:
I came across this hilarious YouTube short from a British TV show. I think the British have some great TV, and this one had me rolling on the floor laughing. Enjoy!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x87TJoxvHso

https://michaelreflects.com/notes/note-07a73c9c3/

item.title: I think someone in our neighborhood lost a rabbit 🐇, and it ...
item.description: I think someone in our neighborhood lost a rabbit 🐇, and it somehow ended up in our backyard. He won’t let us get too close, but he’s adorable! #LostRabbit

item.title: We’re under a Tornado Watch 🌪️, and the weather is showing i...
item.description: We’re under a Tornado Watch 🌪️, and the weather is showing it. It’s been really windy all day 🌬️, and the rain is just starting 🌧️. We need the rain, but definitely not any tornadoes . #TornadoWatch #WeatherUpdate #Florida

item.title: Not sure I'll renew my Claude sub next year 🤔. Limits are fr...
item.description: Not sure I'll renew my Claude sub next year 🤔. Limits are frustrating, used to reset every 4 hrs, now 5, but I hit cap in 15-20 mins ⛔. Weekly limits worse. ChatGPT feels lighter. Windsurf AI even more disappointing 😞. Thinking hard, prepping my own local LLM 💡🤖.

item.title:
🍿 Watched Nobody (2021)
⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: MILD SPOILERS M...
item.description:
🍿 Watched Nobody (2021)

⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: MILD SPOILERS My Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ (4/5 stars) Highly, highly unbelievable yet very entertaining. Great cast. If you want to kill about two hours and are after a fun, fast-paced movie,

https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/26/watched-nobody/

item.title: SAAS - or 'Sitting As A Service' as I call what happens on O...
item.description:
SAAS - or 'Sitting As A Service' as I call what happens on Oneroa Beach on Waiheke.: https://john.philpin.com/2026/04/26/saas-or-sitting-as-a.html

Waiheke rersidents and visitors enjoy the ability to site along Oneroa beach thanks to one person’s initiative to create casual seating for beachgoers.

item.title: Windows passwordless sign-in is a strong security goal, but ...
item.description: Windows passwordless sign-in is a strong security goal, but Microsoft isn't done yet. Hello, PIN, and passkeys work for login, but Task Schd, RDP, services, & network creds still need passwords. Passwordless shouldn't cause legacy Windows features to break unexpectedly ⚠️. #SelfHosting #Microsoft

item.title: We should finally bring social media into the future and rep...
item.description: We should finally bring social media into the future and replace the grid/carousel with the image cube. It's a whole dimension that we're all missing out on

item.title:
Loura's Website Magic
If you ever want to see a master craf...
item.description:
Loura's Website Magic

If you ever want to see a master craftswoman at website design and theming, then you must stop over at Hey Loura! She is also in my BlogRoll. Her latest creation is spectacular and pirate-themed. She

Memes Connect Us, I Guess
I usually watch BGT (Britain's Go...
item.description:
Memes Connect Us, I Guess

I usually watch BGT (Britain's Got Talent) clips on YouTube because the British often have really interesting acts. One I liked was the Glantaf Boys Choir from Wales. They were excellent, and it made

https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/21/memes-connect-us-i-guess/

item.title: Framework almost gave me a heart attack 😱 (Framework AI). Th...
item.description: Framework almost gave me a heart attack 😱 (Framework AI). That felt more like an April Fools' joke 🤡. #Framework #Selfhosting #Tech

item.title: Gave my Zola blog a proper home, Much better than a . URL....
item.description:
Gave my Zola blog a proper home, https://michaelreflects.com. Much better than a .https://pages.dev URL. 🤓. It's been given a modern facelift too. Stop by and let me know what you think.

Michael’s Journal

item.title: Good way to begin the morning ☀️. It’s going to be a hot one...
item.description: Good way to begin the morning ☀️. It’s going to be a hot one, though 🔥.

item.title: We just had a power outage again ⚡. I need another UPS becau...
item.description: We just had a power outage again ⚡. I need another UPS because the one I have can’t handle everything 🔋. I want a dedicated UPS for the mini PC running the Plex server 💻🎥. This is the second time it’s happened this week 😓. #PowerOutage #SelfHosting

item.title: I’ve resubscribed to ChatGPT, and Codex is actually pretty g...
item.description: I’ve resubscribed to ChatGPT, and Codex is actually pretty good. I’m using it more with Clairvoyance (from Star Dock) now that Claude has ridiculously low usage limits😤.

item.title: Back to work tomorrow 😩, but it feels like my vacation just ...
item.description: Back to work tomorrow 😩, but it feels like my vacation just started 🌴. I really don’t want to go back... 😞

item.title:
Moon Views, Earth Love
I have been watching the Artemis II ...
item.description:
Moon Views, Earth Love

I have been watching the Artemis II mission off and on. I saw these pictures on the NASA website, and here are a few that I really like. They definitely got me thinking. I have always been fascinated

https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/07/moon-views-earth-love/

item.title: Samsung Messages is about to shut down for good – why were y...
item.description:
Samsung Messages is about to shut down for good – why were you still using it? [Poll]

Samsung Messages is about to shut down for good – why were you still using it? [Poll]
After years of back and forth, Samsung Messages is officially shutting down for good in July and, while most were already on Google Messages, the switch is frustrating to some. Why were you still using Samsung’s app? more…

item.title: You know what I hate? 😠 When a company knows their product i...
item.description: You know what I hate? 😠 When a company knows their product is defective but doesn’t proactively fix it or offer a replacement. The Logitech G703 Lightspeed is about to be tossed 🖱️💥. The left button won’t stay engaged for dragging, and apparently, that’s a known issue. 😤 #TechTroubles #Logitech

item.title:
Birthday Thoughts on a Country at a Crossroads
I turn 57 th...
item.description:
Birthday Thoughts on a Country at a Crossroads

I turn 57 this month, and with everything going on in the world, it almost feels like an afterthought. This year feels worse, more doom and gloom than others. I am not entirely sure

https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/06/birthday-thoughts-on-a-country/

item.title: Well, how about this ☀️, the sun is shining, and it's rainin...
item.description: Well, how about this ☀️, the sun is shining, and it's raining at the same time 🌧️. #Florida #NatureMagic

🍿Watched Civil War (2024)

⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: FULL SPOILERS My Rating: ½ (0.5/5 stars) The movie stunk, and it stunk so bad I kept watching only for the action at the end. It made no sense to me. Why were we in a civil war? Se

item.title: I understand AI firms must manage costs, but token limits hu...
item.description: I understand AI firms must manage costs, but token limits hurt coding 💻. They break flow mid-debug or refactor, losing context. Time-based access or guaranteed session times (30-60 mins) ⏰ would protect workflows better. Treating chats and debugging the same with tokens just doesn’t fit 🚫. #AI

item.title: Christ conquered death so that we might have eternal life. T...
item.description: Christ conquered death so that we might have eternal life. That's the miracle we celebrate today. 🙌✨ #EasterSunday #Easter #HolidayCelebration

item.title: Great day! 🐞 I squashed some bugs in my programs and got Git...
item.description: Great day! 🐞 I squashed some bugs in my programs and got Gitea set up, so now I have my own Git system. 🚀 Hopefully, when AI messes me up, it’ll be easier to get back on track. 🤖 #SelfHosting #Gitea

item.title: The best stories have a ✝️ pause, a moment of silence before...
item.description: The best stories have a ✝️ pause, a moment of silence before the triumph. That’s what Holy Saturday teaches us. 🌑🕯️ #HolySaturday #EasterWeekend

item.title: Nothing more fun than sitting at the dealership on your firs...
item.description: Nothing more fun than sitting at the dealership on your first day of vacation getting maintenance and recalls handled.

item.title:
History Made April 1, 2026 Artemis II Launched!

item.description:
History Made April 1, 2026 Artemis II Launched!

History was made today. The kind of history that will be written about and studied for years to come, and I was able to capture it from my backyard. Artemis II successfully launched
